title: Support horticultural production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support horticultural production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare materials, tools and equipment for horticultural production work

pcs.text: Collect required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Check materials, tools and equipment required to carry out routine horticultural production work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check materials, tools and equipment required to carry out routine horticultural production work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check materials, tools and equipment required to carry out routine horticultural production work.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements.

pcs.text: Report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor.

pcs.text: Provide horticultural production work support according to work health and safety requirements and supervisor instruction
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide horticultural production work support according to work health and safety requirements and supervisor instruction?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide horticultural production work support according to work health and safety requirements and supervisor instruction.

pcs.text: Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor.
